QuickBooksListId.description: Stable QuickBooks Desktop item ListID/item hex for this sellable variant. Do not treat SKU as the canonical QBD key.

QualifiesForFreeDeliveryOffers.description: When false, this SKU can be purchased but does not count toward free shipping/free local delivery thresholds.

FreeDeliveryExclusionReason.description: Optional customer-safe line-item note, e.g. 'Does not count toward free delivery.'

WaitlistEnabled.description: Variant-level override for whether the storefront may collect back-in-stock requests when this variant has zero Medusa inventory.

AvailabilityLifecycle.description: Variant-level lifecycle separate from inventory quantity. Use seasonal_inactive for off-season Passover variants that should not accept waitlist requests.

FutureOrderEligible.description: Variant-level override for future committed demand outside the replenishment window.

ReplenishmentLeadDays.description: Variant-level replenishment lead day override. Product value wins only when this is blank.

SafetyStockQuantity.description: Variant-level quantity held back from available-to-promise calculations.

UnavailableMessage.description: Optional customer-facing copy for this variant when unavailable.

AlternativeVariantIds.description: Optional comma- or newline-separated Medusa variant IDs to suggest as replacements for this variant.
